title: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Kgatleng District Council (cemetery) Bye-laws
title_en: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Kgatleng District Council (cemetery) Bye-laws

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Bye-laws may be cited as the Kgatleng District Council (Cemetery) Bye-laws.

provisions.title: Interpretation
Establishment of cemeteries
provisions.content:
3. Establishment of cemeteries
The Council shall establish and designate areas within the jurisdiction of the Council area as cemeteries.

provisions.title: Burial in cemetery
provisions.content:
4. Burial in cemetery
(1) A person shall not bury or cause to be buried, a body in a place other than a cemetery.
(2) Without prejudice to sub-bye-law (1), the Council may in special circumstances authorise burial in other places other than the designated cemetery.

provisions.title: Permit for burial
provisions.content:
5. Permit for burial
(1) A person shall not bury or cause to be buried, a body in a cemetery unless a permit for the burial of that body has been issued by the Council or the caretaker of the cemetery and upon payment of the fees prescribed in bye-law 6.

definitions.definition: the Council Secretary or any employee duly authorised thereto
a Local Government officer serving in the Council
the person designated by the District Council as such
any designated area established as a cemetery under bye-law 3
any person under the age of 18 years of age
the area of jurisdiction of Kgatleng District Council so designated for the purpose of these Bye-laws
any gravestone, monument epitaph, tabled or monumental inscription and any work ancillary thereto.
